detailMeta: {{#if DetailImageUrl}}<meta property="og:image" content="{{DetailImageUrl}}" />{{/if}}<meta property="og:type" content="article" /><link rel="canonical" href="{{Context.DetailUrl}}" /><meta property="og:url" content="{{Context.DetailUrl}}" /><meta property="twitter:url" content="{{Context.DetailUrl}}" />
